title: The Inventor's Workshop
content: Beneath the Springtown observatory lies Hiro's workshop, a sprawling underground space filled with mechanical wonders. Gears of every size hang from the ceiling, blueprints cover every wall, and the gentle ticking of clocks provides a constant rhythm. Hiro's most ambitious project is the Starlight Condenser, a device designed to capture and store the energy of starlight. The workshop is connected to the observatory above through a network of pneumatic tubes and optical cables that Hiro built himself.
